ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fmr_data" (
  "fmr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FMR record */,
  "fips2010" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county or metropolitan area */,
  "state" INTEGER /* State code */,
  "metro_code" TEXT /* Metro code */,
  "areaname" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "county" INTEGER /* County code */,
  "cousub" INTEGER /* County subdivision code */,
  "countyname" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town or city in the county */,
  "pop2010" INTEGER /* Population of the county in 2010 */,
  "acs_2017_2" INTEGER /* ACS 2017 estimate */,
  "state_alpha" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "fmr_type" INTEGER /* Type of FMR (e.g., 40th percentile) */,
  "metro" INTEGER /* Metropolitan area indicator */,
  "fmr_pct_chg" REAL /* Percentage change in FMR */,
  "fmr_dollar_chg" REAL /* Dollar change in FMR */,
  "fmr_year" INTEGER /* Year of the FMR data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the FMR data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the FMR record */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the FMR record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fmr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fmr_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fmr_data_fmr_type FOREIGN KEY ("fmr_type") REFERENCES fmr_types ("fmr_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fmr_data_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fmr_data_metro_code FOREIGN KEY ("metro_code") REFERENCES metros ("metro_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the state */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the state record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the county */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the county record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metros" (
  "metro_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "metro_code" TEXT /* Metro code */,
  "metro_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the metropolitan area */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the metropolitan area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the metropolitan area record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metro_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acs_data" (
  "acs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ACS record */,
  "acs_year" INTEGER /* Year of the ACS data */,
  "acs_estimate" INTEGER /* ACS estimate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State code */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* County code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population estimate from the ACS */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income estimate from the ACS */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ACS data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the ACS record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acs_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acs_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fmr_types" (
  "fmr_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FMR type */,
  "fmr_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the FMR type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the FMR type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fmr_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "fmr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FMR record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the FMR record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the FMR record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the FMR record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the FMR record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fmr_id FOREIGN KEY ("fmr_id") REFERENCES fmr_data ("fmr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fmr_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "fmr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FMR record being tracked */,
  "fmr_year" INTEGER /* Year of the FMR value */,
  "fmr_value" REAL /* Value of the FMR */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the FMR historical data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the FMR historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fmr_history_fmr_id FOREIGN KEY ("fmr_id") REFERENCES fmr_data ("fmr_id")
)
